name: TB Rule-Out Workup + Cultures HD5
facility: Johns Hopkins Hospital Lab + State TB Reference Lab
specimen: Sputum (via ET tube suction) x3 + 1 for NAAT; blood; biliary fluid culture follow-up

results.name: Sputum NAAT (Xpert MTB/RIF) — Mycobacterium tuberculosis complex
Biliary fluid culture (from ERCP 2/16)
results.value: E. coli, susceptible to ceftriaxone, ciprofloxacin, piperacillin-tazobactam, ampicillin-sulbactam; intermediate to ampicillin alone; susceptible to gentamicin

results.name: Admission blood cultures speciation (5/15)
results.value: Coagulase-negative Staphylococcus — confirmed contaminant pattern (single bottle, no time-to-positivity match)

interpretation: Active pulmonary tuberculosis effectively RULED OUT: 3 sputum AFB smears negative + Xpert MTB/RIF negative. Final 8-week cultures also negative. Airborne isolation discontinued HD8. Biliary E. coli identified as source organism — sensitive to current pip/tazo. Patient's latent TB infection (2010) remains untreated but no evidence of reactivation.
